headline: BRO Lags Industry, Trades at a Discount: What Investors Should Do Now?

headline: AJG Strengthens Specialty Insurance Through Med James Acquisition
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands its specialty insurance platform with the Med James acquisition, strengthening wholesale brokerage and MGA capabilities to support long-term growth.
